title: "Regenerates API key. It generates new API key value and updates its time of expiration."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Regenerates API key. It generates new API key value and updates its time of expiration."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/api-keys/{apiKeyId}/regenerate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Regenerates API key. It generates new API key value and updates its time of expiration.
